name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the first four ingredients.
2. Add eggs and mix well.
3. Sift dry ingredients together and blend into sugar mixture.
4. Stir in chips.
5. Mound by tablespoonfuls onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes, then remove from sheets and cool.
7-8 dozen
